candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; matches Net sales values and is the candidate that exactly represents total revenue/sales.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total revenue line.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold
candidates.why: Direct COGS-style label, but only populated in some years and appears not to cover all direct costs in years where a broader cost-of-revenues total is present.

candidates.row_label: Material Expenses - Materials, Inventory, Own Work & Utility
candidates.why: Direct materials component only, not full COGS.
Cost line but appears to be incomplete versus the reported total in some years.
Direct materials only, not full cost of sales.

variables.notes: Candidate list misses the most semantically correct full direct-cost line. 'Cost of Revenues - Total' exactly matches the full cost-of-sales total for 2024-2021 and is preferable to partial/component alternatives. 2025 appears presented under a different cost classification, so coverage may vary by year. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Cost of Revenues - Total

candidates.why: Explicit overhead bucket for selling expenses; best SG&A component despite duplicate row label appearing in the sheet.
Explicit overhead bucket for administrative expenses; best SG&A component despite duplicate row label appearing in the sheet.
Possible overhead bucket, but includes FX losses and other non-SG&A operating items, so less suitable.
Granular SG&A subcomponent, but selecting alongside Selling Expenses would risk overlap because Selling Expenses appears to be a subtotal.
Granular SG&A subcomponent, but selecting alongside Administrative Expenses would risk overlap because Administrative Expenses appears to be a subtotal.
Could be overhead under nature-of-expense presentation, but may overlap with cost of revenues in some years.
Too broad and likely includes production labor in some years.
Too broad and likely includes production labor in 2025 nature-of-expense presentation.
Too broad/ambiguous for SG&A-only mapping.

variables.notes: Selected explicit selling and administrative overhead buckets. Did not add personnel subrows to avoid double counting because those appear to roll into the corresponding subtotal labels. Excluded 'Other operating expenses' because it contains FX and other non-SG&A items.

candidates.why: R&D-related label exists, but it is amortization of capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not current R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row, not expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated current-period R&D expense line is present above EBIT. 'Amortization of Research & Development Expenses' is amortization, which should be excluded from XRD.

candidates.why: Primary recurring financing cost line.
Recurring finance-cost component that can supplement interest expense when granular finance items are provided.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring lease-interest component; should be included with interest expense if using granular components.
Broader total that includes FX and other items; less preferred than granular components.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance-cost components and excluded FX-related rows and the broader 'Financial expenses' total to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the Parent Company
candidates.why: Best owner-only equity line; excludes non-controlling interests and therefore avoids double counting with MIB.
Total equity includes minority interest and is less preferred when an owner-only equity line exists.
Same issue as Total Equity; less preferred.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the Parent Company

variables.notes: Preferred owner-attributable equity to keep BE exclusive of minority interest.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet NCI line; best match for minority interest.
Equivalent alternative label present in the balance sheet.
Income statement allocation of profit to NCI, not balance-sheet minority equity.
Income statement allocation, not balance-sheet equity.

variables.notes: Selected the balance-sheet non-controlling interest line for MIB.
